articles.title: Method Delhi’s ‘Slow Rot’ Explores Trauma, Decay & Resistance Through The Grotesque
articles.summary: From Nero’s Domus Aurea to TikTok shitposts, the grotesque has always thrived in moments of crisis. Method Delhi’s Slow Rot traces this lineage through unsettling works by Priyesh T., Tithi Das, Revant Dasgupta, and others.

articles.title: sā Ladakh 2026: The World's Highest Altitude Bienale Brings Together Art, Culture, & Community
articles.summary: sā Ladakh Biennale 2026 brings together artists, curators, and communities across Ladakh’s lived landscapes for a regenerative art initiative exploring ecology, memory, and collective futures under the theme ‘Signals from Another Star’.
